narrative:
Cols 65-C (precinct in Franklin County) has 980 registered voters, with 54.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.3%, a clear Democratic lean of 7.2 percentage points.
